results.title: Vancouver Ancient Forest: Explore Historic Stanley Park: Book Tours & Activities at Peek.com
results.content:
Review provided by Viator

Escape06842359745

May 15, 2026

Colin- The Tree whisperer - Colin is passionate, knowledgeable, funny, informative and overall great tour guide. It is a wonderful tour that should not be missed. How often do you get to walk among 1000+ year old trees, see the champion big leaf maple tree of Canada and have a beautiful small group tour in such a beautiful part of the forest, yet be so close to a city.

Review provided by Tripadvisor

Linda\_g

May 14, 2026

A must! - Colin is amazing. He is a learned historian as well as an expert on ancient trees. He took us to parts of Stanley Park that we would never have found on our own. If you visit Vancouver, this tour is a must!

Review provided by Viator

Christine\_y

May 14, 2026 [...] F2523kvmichaeld

May 22, 2026

Mega Trees of Vancouver - We had a wonderful time with our guide Colin. The tour was filled with historic insite about the park and massive Mega Trees. Very impressive, it was beautiful and tranquil saw some wildlife and even got eyes on the local resident eagle.

Review provided by Tripadvisor

Michael\_d

May 22, 2026

Mega Trees - Our guide Colin was absolutely phenomenal. The tour was super informative and we had a great time. Learned a lot, saw mega trees, wildlife and even got eyes on the eagle. Highly recommended.

Review provided by Viator

X2025oumadelinem

May 18, 2026 [...] Review provided by Viator

X2025oumadelinem

May 18, 2026

Awesome excursion!! - This was a great excursion! Informative about trees and history. Colin the tour guide is great. He really cares and it shows. We had a lot of fun. We would highly recommend to anyone. If you are in Vancouver definitely check it out.

Review provided by Tripadvisor

Madeline\_m

May 18, 2026

Definitely do this excursion in Vancouver! - This was great excursion. Fun, informative and interesting. Colin, the tour guide is a great person who really cares about educating people about nature and history. We loved walking around Stanley park and being told the history of the park and different trees. Highly recommend

Review provided by Viator

Escape06842359745

brittanywheatart

We went on an awesome walking tour through Stanley Park forest today. Our guide was so great. He told us so much history of the park, the trees, the culture of the area. My life-long love of trees and nature had me nerding out with every tree fact our guide shared. I took so.many.photos of the ancient trees, moss, ferns, bark texture, tree canopies, roots, etc. and of course I had my tiny sketchbook out during almost the whole three hour forest tour to take notes and make observation sketches. Being in the middle of the woods genuinely brings me such joy.

SmallCaps [...] '/%3e%3c/defs%3e%3cpath fill='%23012169' d='M0 0h10080v5040H0z'/%3e%3cpath stroke='%23fff' stroke-width='.6' d='m0 0 6 3m0-3L0 3' clip-path='url(%23b)' transform='scale(840)'/%3e%3cpath stroke='%23e4002b' stroke-width='.4' d='m0 0 6 3m0-3L0 3' clip-path='url(%23c)' transform='scale(840)'/%3e%3cpath stroke='%23fff' stroke-width='840' d='M2520 0v2520M0 1260h5040'/%3e%3cpath stroke='%23e4002b' stroke-width='504' d='M2520 0v2520M0 1260h5040'/%3e%3cg fill='%23fff'%3e%3cuse xlink:href='%23d' x='2520' y='3780'/%3e%3cuse xlink:href='%23a' x='7560' y='4200'/%3e%3cuse xlink:href='%23a' x='6300' y='2205'/%3e%3cuse xlink:href='%23a' x='7560' y='840'/%3e%3cuse xlink:href='%23a' x='8680' y='1869'/%3e%3cuse xlink:href='%23e' x='8064' y='2730'/%3e%3c/g%3e%3c/svg%3e "Australia") [...] Vysarn expects the transaction to be approximately 25% earnings per share accretive on a pro forma basis, using its FY2026 net profit before tax forecast and NewGround’s assumed maintainable net profit before tax.

The purchase price assumes NewGround will be acquired debt free and with an agreed working capital amount of $6m at completion.

## Upfront and Deferred Consideration

The acquisition includes an upfront payment of $8.33m in cash and 28.6 million Vysarn shares, equivalent to total upfront consideration of $30m.

Of the upfront shares, 25.3 million will be escrowed for 12 months and 3.3 million for 24 months.

Deferred consideration will depend on NewGround’s future EBIT performance over the three years after completion.
